text:
__. The venous blood passes through the _______ and from there branches off into the _______ and ______ before circulating through the _____. After being oxygenatated, the blood re-enters the heart through the ________ which converge into the _______. Then the blood flows through the _______ into the ________. From here, blood is ejected through the ________ into the ______ before entering the _______ and finally systemic circulation. HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 109

1. Superior vena cava 2. Inferior vena cava 3. Right atrium 4. Left atrium 5. Lungs 6. Pulmonary veins 7. Left pulmonary artery 8. Right pulmonary artery 9. Right atrioventricular valve 10. Mitral valves 11. Ascending aorta 12. Arch of aorta 13. Aortic semilunar valve 14. Pulmonary semilunar valve 15. Left ventricle 16. Right ven
